title: Advanced Valuables
description:
A mod that adds differents of valuable items!
Besides vanilla valuable items, it adds more valuable items.
body:
![Advanced Valuables Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46747d0851e88fc88a7686202604f5365eff5939.png)
# Advanced Valuables
A mod that adds different types of Valuables!
## What does this mod do?
You are bored.... you are only using Diamonds, Irons and Netherites for tools and armor, Emerald for trading and Gold for be protected from piglins.

Your wish is more gems.

Well, your wish came true if you are using this mod! This mod adds different types of valuables!
## Required Mod Loader
### NeoForge Mods ![NeoForge Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0228fb881e14e59ec5698e5cf22cf1c914aec3f8.png)

[NeoForge](https://neoforged.net/) is required for NeoForge mods
<details>
<summary>For 1.21-1.21.1</summary>
Required NeoForge Mod Loader version --> 21.0.157 or higher
</details>
<details>
<summary>For 1.21.3</summary>
Required NeoForge Mod Loader version --> 21.3.57
</details>

### Forge Mods ![Forge Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/179d8861362badbbe4c74c68fd4bf99d6e906971.png)

[Forge](https://files.minecraftforge.net/) is required for Forge Mods

<details>
<summary>For 1.21-1.21.1</summary>
Required Version --> 51.0.33 or above
</details>

<details>
<summary>For 1.21.3</summary>
Required Version --> 53.0.25
</details>

### Fabric Mods ![Fabric Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98d55ff76f248ad2bbd23915c53f1a487c93b72b.png)
First, Install [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/) Loader
<details>
<summary>For 1.21-1.21.1</summary>
Required Loader Version --> 0.16.5 or above
  
Required Fabric API Version --> 0.104.0+1.21.1 or above

</details>

<details>
<summary>For 1.21-1.21.3</summary>
Required Loader Version --> 0.16.9 or above
  
Required Fabric API Version --> 0.107.0+1.21.3 or above

</details>

## Dependencies
### For Fabric
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) is an optional dependency
- [Fabric API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api/files) is a required dependency
## What are the Features?
### Features modified minecraft
- Raw Blocks can be smelt to Solid Blocks! Example: Raw Iron Block ---->**Smelting/Blasting**----> Iron Block.
### Features in Mod!
- Added varieties of valuables
- Added varieties of valuable of Block
- Added Ore Generation
- Added Tools and Armor
- Added Effective Foods (like Golden Apple)
- Added Hammer (Mines 5x5 area!)
- Added Enchantments for fun!
## Quick Notes!
**_NOTE: FUSION GEM IS NOT OBTAINABLE IN SURVIVAL. BECAUSE GEM GRINDER AND FUSION GEM STATION BLOCK RECIPE HAVEN'T ADDED. THESE ARE NOW EXPERIMENTAL_**
## Pages
- [Click Here](https://modrinth.com/mod/advanced-valuables) to go to in Modrinth Page
- [Click Here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/advanced-valuables) to go to in CurseForge Page
## Suggest and Review!
I don't know, but you could be faced any problems in this mod.

So, report problems in [GitHub](https://github.com/TheMinecraftMan2012/Advanced-Valuables/issues)! 
## Source Codes
Yes, this mod is open source mod. This source is freely opened as this source code is under MIT License. You can edit, copy, fork, use, distribute, sell copies and so on. You can also take an idea how to make a minecraft mod.

**NOTE! MUST GIVE CREDITS TO THIS MOD AND ITS DEVELOPER(S)**
